response: With over 15 years of specialized experience in medical transcription and scribing across diverse specialties, I offer exceptional proficiency in medical terminology and EMR platforms like eClinicalWorks and Experity. My career highlights include supervising teams, ensuring high-quality output with strict adherence to turnaround times, and managing customer relationships in both healthcare and industrial sectors. As a dedicated multi-tasker, I consistently exceed productivity targets while maintaining the highest standards of accuracy and compliance. My background encompasses roles from Medical Editor to Quality Analyst, demonstrating a proven ability to adapt, lead, and drive organizational success. I am eager to bring my strong interpersonal skills, leadership experience, and technical expertise to your team to enhance operational efficiency. With a typing speed of 70–80 words per minute and a commitment to continuous learning, I am ready to contribute immediately. Thank you for considering my application for the Medical Scribe/Transcriptionist position.
